w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh wp14

w:r.w:t: (can be uploaded or taken with phone camera)
This only applies if the association has sub-groups.
If the association is small, this can simply be disabled.
Admin can create different collection items.
Applies to all members or selected group
Each payment should generate a receipt.
For voluntary contributions, the system should allow:
System assigns it to all or selected members
Treasurer records or system receives payment
